objective: Turn a public-safe research acceptance workflow into a reusable proof-carrying capability.

immutableVersions.label: Persuasive artifact
immutableVersions.reason: Useful language is not reusable capability. Missing ProofPacket, baseline, replay, and rollback target.

immutableVersions.label: Proof-linked candidate
immutableVersions.reason: Evidence exists, but baseline comparison and scope boundary are incomplete.

immutableVersions.label: Canary candidate
immutableVersions.reason: Proof and baseline clear; canary monitoring and challenge window remain open.

immutableVersions.label: Proof-carrying artifact
immutableVersions.reason: Proof, eval, risk, rollback, canary, scope, and challenge gates clear. Upgrade right earned for the synthetic demo scope.
immutableVersions.scope: AI research review / public-safe browser demo

invariant: A reusable artifact cannot silently mutate; a new version must carry proof and pass gates.
